entries.topic: Sample Rate Mismatch Fix and Pipeline Standardization
entries.summary: Successfully diagnosed and fixed critical sample rate mismatch in numogram audio pipeline. Updated mod_writer/utils.py to use 44100 Hz default instead of 8363 Hz, and removed hardcoded 8363 values from cli.py and composer.py. Verified pipeline works correctly with 44.1 kHz audio. Updated relevant skill documentation to reflect changes.
